ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., Europe, Asia) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the score belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the score was measured */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the country in the happiness index */,
  "score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the happiness score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_per_capita" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP per capita measurement */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the measurement belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the GDP per capita data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_per_capita_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social support measurement */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the measurement belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the social support data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_support_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthy_life_expectancy" (
  "expectancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthy life expectancy measurement */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the measurement belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the healthy life expectancy data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expectancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthy_life_expectancy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedom_to_make_life_choices" (
  "freedom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freedom to make life choices measurement */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the measurement belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the freedom to make life choices data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freedom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_to_make_life_choices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity" (
  "generosity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity measurement */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the measurement belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the generosity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generosity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perceptions_of_corruption" (
  "corruption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perceptions of corruption measurement */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the measurement belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption score of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the perceptions of corruption data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corruption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perceptions_of_corruption_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actual_gdp_per_capita" (
  "actual_gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actual GDP per capita measurement */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the measurement belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "actual_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Actual GDP per capita of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the actual GDP per capita data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actual_gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actual_gdp_per_capita_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedom_scores" (
  "freedom_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freedom score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the score belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the score was measured */,
  "freedom_score" REAL /* Freedom score of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the freedom score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freedom_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "giving_indices" (
  "giving_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each giving index */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the index belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the index was measured */,
  "giving_index" REAL /* Giving index of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the giving index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("giving_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_giving_indices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_expectancies" (
  "life_expectancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life expectancy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the measurement belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the life expectancy data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_expectancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_supports" (
  "social_support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social support measurement */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the measurement belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the social support data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_supports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trust_in_governments" (
  "trust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trust in government measurement */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the measurement belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "trust_in_government" REAL /* Trust in government score of the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trust in government data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trust_in_governments_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_access" (
  "team_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team access event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the dataset */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
